summary: Set 021 (2 sessions, 2026-05-11): developer-approachability improvements to reduce new-developer intimidation. Session 1 (commit 7aba912): added docs/quick-start.md (220-line entry point with adoption paths, scaffold examples, first-session runbook, common-failure table); added quick-nav callout + 'skip if requiresUAT:false' divider to workflow doc; added Quick Start section to CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md/GEMINI.md; simplified adoption-bootstrap.md pattern catalog from 7 abstract patterns to 3 concrete examples; simplified wizard spec template to lead with 3 primary flags. Verification: 3 GPT-5.4 rounds; all findings addressed. Session 2 (commit 39f41ad): extracted ai_router/queue_verification.py from close_session.py (outsource-last queue polling machinery, 230 lines, platform-only); archived backfill_session_state.py and dump_session_state_schema.py to ai_router/scripts/; added orientation docstrings to 7 modules; added module map to __init__.py. No behavioral changes. 679/679 tests pass (50 moved to scripts/ with migration utilities). No Session 2 verification route needed — tests provided sufficient confidence at operator's autonomous-execution request.
